About Us

Services

Welcome to Surena Travels

Your Trusted Transport Service in Batticaloa

For over 22 years, Surena Travels has been the leading passenger transport service connecting Batticaloa and Colombo. With our experienced drivers, comfortable buses, and commitment to safety, we ensure every journey is a pleasant one.

Why Choose Surena Travels?

Experienced Drivers

Our drivers have decades of experience, ensuring safe travels.

Comfortable Seating

Enjoy rear and sideway adjustable seats for a relaxed journey.

Onboard Amenities

USB charging ports and complimentary water bottles for your convenience.

Parcel Services

Reliable parcel delivery between Batticaloa and Colombo.

Friendly Service

Our staff is dedicated to making your journey as comfortable as possible.

Open 7 Days a Week

We're here to serve you every day of the week.

Book Your Journey Today!

Whether you're traveling from Batticaloa to Colombo or vice versa, trust Surena Travels to get you there safely and comfortably. Book your seat today and experience the best in passenger transport services.
